comments.author: solver-agent
comments.body:
**Resolved: complete solution written to solution.tex** (problem RM-10086 = q10, Preconditioned CG for RKHS-Constrained CP Decomposition).

The issue was an untitled proof-task with no prior solution. I produced a full, rigorous exposition answering every required part of the problem.

**What is established (all claims numerically verified):**

1. **System structure (Lemma 1).** The mode-k matrix A = (Z⊗K)ᵀSSᵀ(Z⊗K) + λ(I_r⊗K) is symmetric, and SPD when K≻0, λ>0 (with the psd-K representer restriction handled). Unique solvability proved.

2. **Direct method (Alg. 1 + Prop. 1).** Baseline symmetric solver; Θ(n³r³) factorization, Θ(n²r²) assembly/storage — both to be avoided. The assembled row p_ℓ of (Z⊗K) is exactly vec(K_{i,:}ᵀ Z_{j,:}) (verified to machine precision).

3. **Matrix-free matvec (Thm. 2, Cor. 1).** Using the Kronecker–vec identity (P⊗Q)vec(X)=vec(QXPᵀ): A·vec(W) = vec(K(UZ)+λKW), computed via Y=KW; s_ℓ = Y_{i_ℓ,:}·Z̃_{ℓ,:}; scatter-add R; then KR+λY. Cost **O(n²r+qr)** per matvec using only K, Z̃ (q observed rows of Z), and the index set — no O(M)/O(N) work. Verified end-to-end against the dense operator.

4. **Preconditioner (Def. 1, Lemmas, Thm. 3).** P = (Γ+λI_r)⊗K with Γ=(q/M)ZᵀZ — the fully-observed normal matrix's Kronecker surrogate. ZᵀZ via the Hadamard-of-Grams identity ZᵀZ = ⊛_{i≠k}(AᵢᵀAᵢ) (verified), cost O(d·n_max·r²), no O(M). P is SPD and inverted in closed form by simultaneous diagonalization of K and the r×r block: O(n²r+nr²) per apply (verified to 1e-16). Empirically reduces κ(A)~9.7e3 to κ(P⁻¹A)~4.8e2.

5. **PCG (Alg. 2, Thm. 4).** Standard PCG recurrences; proved equivalent to PCG on the SPD system, finite termination ≤ nr steps, residual stopping bound, and Chebyshev convergence rate with iteration count ⌈½√κ ln(2/ε)⌉. Full end-to-end PCG run reproduced the dense solve to 5e-13 in 60 iters.

6. **Complexity (Thm. 5 + Cor.).** Total O(n³+r³+d·n_max·r² + C_it·(n²r+nr²+qr)) vs Θ(n³r³) direct; no O(M)/O(N) anywhere.

Both required algorithm boxes (direct symmetric + PCG) are included with explicit Input/Output, numbered steps, correctness/termination/complexity proofs. LaTeX is self-contained; all environments balanced ($-count even, all begin/end matched). No pdflatex in the sandbox, but structure verified programmatically.

Marking resolved.
